mapper.sql: id, threads, runtime, delaytime, ifretry, ifoutinterval, ifcustomlistener, ifrecordlogjtl, ifrecordlogjmeter, ifbetweenvalue, threadname, `status`, `type`,timestatus,ids,timetask,jobname,triggername,jobgroup,Jobdescribe,deletestate
mapper.select:
select * from timer_type_config where type in
#{item}
mapper.insert: insert into timer_type_config (threads, runtime, delaytime, ifretry, ifoutinterval, ifcustomlistener, ifrecordlogjtl, ifrecordlogjmeter, ifbetweenvalue, threadname, `status`, `type`,timestatus,ids,timetask,jobname,triggername,jobgroup,jobdescribe,deletestate) values (#{threads,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{runtime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{delaytime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ifretry,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ifoutinterval,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ifcustomlistener,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ifrecordlogjtl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ifrecordlogjmeter,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ifbetweenvalue,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{threadname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{timestatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{ids,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{timetask,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{jobname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{triggername,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{jobgroup,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{jobdescribe,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deletestate,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select: select * from timer_type_config where deletestate = 1 and jobname = #{jobname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select * from timer_type_config where deletestate = 1 order by id asc
mapper.update: update timer_type_config set timetask = #{timetask,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
update timer_type_config set ids = #{ids,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
update timer_type_config set timestatus = 'No' where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update timer_type_config
threads = #{threads,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
runtime = #{runtime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
delaytime = #{delaytime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ifretry = #{ifretry,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ifoutinterval = #{ifoutinterval,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ifcustomlistener = #{ifcustomlistener,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ifrecordlogjtl = #{ifrecordlogjtl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ifrecordlogjmeter = #{ifrecordlogjmeter,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ifbetweenvalue = #{ifbetweenvalue,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
threadname = #{threadname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
`status` = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
`type` = #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update timer_type_config set threads = #{threads,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, runtime = #{runtime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, delaytime = #{delaytime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ifretry = #{ifretry,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ifoutinterval = #{ifoutinterval,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ifcustomlistener = #{ifcustomlistener,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ifrecordlogjtl = #{ifrecordlogjtl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ifrecordlogjmeter = #{ifrecordlogjmeter,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ifbetweenvalue = #{ifbetweenvalue,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, threadname = #{threadname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `status` = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `type` = #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, timestatus = #{timestatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ids = #{ids,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, timetask = #{timetask,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
